records.fail_criteria: Reject invalid config; continue using last known good snapshot
records.rule: Reject invalid config; continue using last known good snapshot

records.fail_criteria: If scheduler stalls, emit HealthReport alert and pause polling
records.rule: If scheduler stalls, emit HealthReport alert and pause polling

records.fail_criteria: Retry w/ deterministic backoff; on persistent failure emit IngestError and skip cycle
records.rule: Retry w/ deterministic backoff; on persistent failure emit IngestError and skip cycle

records.fail_criteria: Emit NormalizationError for malformed rows; continue with valid CalendarEvent
records.rule: Emit NormalizationError for malformed rows; continue with valid CalendarEvent

records.fail_criteria: Rollback and retry once; on persistent failure halt calendar pipeline
records.rule: Rollback and retry once; on persistent failure halt calendar pipeline

records.fail_criteria: Default to conservative suppression metadata; emit error event
records.rule: Default to conservative suppression metadata; emit error event

records.fail_criteria: Emit IngestError; skip malformed ticks
records.rule: Emit IngestError; skip malformed ticks

records.fail_criteria: Drop out-of-order ticks per policy; emit error event
records.rule: Drop out-of-order ticks per policy; emit error event

records.fail_criteria: Emit indicator error; do not output partial snapshots unless flagged
records.rule: Emit indicator error; do not output partial snapshots unless flagged

records.fail_criteria: Emit packaging error; do not emit FeatureFrame
records.rule: Emit packaging error; do not emit FeatureFrame

records.fail_criteria: On internal error, emit SignalSuppressed with deterministic reason code
records.rule: On internal error, emit SignalSuppressed with deterministic reason code

records.fail_criteria: Reject intent; emit error event
records.rule: Reject intent; emit error event

records.fail_criteria: On rule engine failure default to REJECT with SAFETY_FAIL reason
records.rule: On rule engine failure default to REJECT with SAFETY_FAIL reason

records.fail_criteria: If compilation fails, emit error; do not proceed to routing
records.rule: If compilation fails, emit error; do not proceed to routing

records.fail_criteria: If routing fails, emit error and reject
records.rule: If routing fails, emit error and reject

records.fail_criteria: Deterministic retry schedule; on persistent failure emit TransportError and stop
records.rule: Deterministic retry schedule; on persistent failure emit TransportError and stop
records.scope: Serialize and send to MT4 adapter

records.fail_criteria: Classify and emit error events; retries per deterministic policy
records.rule: Classify and emit error events; retries per deterministic policy

records.fail_criteria: Emit NormalizationError; quarantine malformed broker events
records.rule: Emit NormalizationError; quarantine malformed broker events
records.scope: Normalize broker events to canonical reports

records.fail_criteria: On OMS inconsistency, quarantine stream and halt new orders
records.rule: On OMS inconsistency, quarantine stream and halt new orders
records.scope: Apply execution reports to OMS state

records.fail_criteria: If PnL cannot be computed, emit TradeClosed with COMPUTATION_ERROR flag
records.rule: If PnL cannot be computed, emit TradeClosed with COMPUTATION_ERROR flag
records.scope: Classify trade close and compute canonical PnL

records.fail_criteria: If mapping fails, emit UNKNOWN bucket and quarantine for review
records.rule: If mapping fails, emit UNKNOWN bucket and quarantine for review

records.fail_criteria: Emit proximity error; default to MOST_CONSERVATIVE proximity bucket
records.rule: Emit proximity error; default to MOST_CONSERVATIVE proximity bucket

records.fail_criteria: If matrix missing, emit MatrixFallbackUsed + safest MatrixDecision
records.rule: If matrix missing, emit MatrixFallbackUsed + safest MatrixDecision

records.fail_criteria: Emit ReentrySuppressed with deterministic reason
records.rule: Emit ReentrySuppressed with deterministic reason

records.fail_criteria: On loop prevention trigger, enforce terminal cooldown and stop
records.rule: On loop prevention trigger, enforce terminal cooldown and stop
records.scope: Loop: reentry intent follows same risk->order->route->transport->execute chain

records.fail_criteria: If health is unknown, default to risk-off posture (suppress new intents)
records.rule: If health is unknown, default to risk-off posture (suppress new intents)

records.pass_criteria: Schema validate; stable ordering; hash snapshot
records.rule: Schema validate; stable ordering; hash snapshot

records.pass_criteria: Frozen-time mode supported for tests
records.rule: Frozen-time mode supported for tests

records.pass_criteria: HTTP 200; payload parsable; source_event_id present
records.rule: HTTP 200; payload parsable; source_event_id present

records.pass_criteria: UTC conversion success; impact in enum; dedup policy applied
records.rule: UTC conversion success; impact in enum; dedup policy applied

records.pass_criteria: Idempotent by message_id; ordered by created_utc + tie-breaker
records.rule: Idempotent by message_id; ordered by created_utc + tie-breaker

records.pass_criteria: No duplicate trigger for event+offset; TTL rules applied
records.rule: No duplicate trigger for event+offset; TTL rules applied

records.pass_criteria: Timestamp freshness; symbol normalization; reject malformed
records.rule: Timestamp freshness; symbol normalization; reject malformed

records.pass_criteria: Deterministic bar boundaries; tie-breaker rules
records.rule: Deterministic bar boundaries; tie-breaker rules

records.pass_criteria: Deterministic rounding; indicator params pinned by config snapshot
records.rule: Deterministic rounding; indicator params pinned by config snapshot

records.pass_criteria: Exact declared feature set; stable ordering
records.rule: Exact declared feature set; stable ordering

records.pass_criteria: Suppression reasons enumerated; no sizing/broker specifics
records.rule: Suppression reasons enumerated; no sizing/broker specifics

records.pass_criteria: Stable correlation_id from Signal; constraints + rationale attached
records.rule: Stable correlation_id from Signal; constraints + rationale attached

records.pass_criteria: Idempotent for same inputs; deterministic sizing + rounding
records.rule: Idempotent for same inputs; deterministic sizing + rounding

records.pass_criteria: client_order_id + idempotency_key assigned per policy
records.rule: client_order_id + idempotency_key assigned per policy

records.pass_criteria: Routing deterministic; preserves OrderIntent hash
records.rule: Routing deterministic; preserves OrderIntent hash

records.pass_criteria: Atomic write+rename (no partial reads); sequence + hash; idempotent resend
records.rule: Atomic write+rename (no partial reads); sequence + hash; idempotent resend
records.scope: Serialize and send to MT4 adapter

records.pass_criteria: EA contains no strategy/risk logic; only execution
records.rule: EA contains no strategy/risk logic; only execution

records.pass_criteria: Dedup + ordering policy; canonical rounding
records.rule: Dedup + ordering policy; canonical rounding
records.scope: Normalize broker events to canonical reports

records.pass_criteria: Idempotent fills; out-of-order handling per policy; stable final state
records.rule: Idempotent fills; out-of-order handling per policy; stable final state
records.scope: Apply execution reports to OMS state

records.pass_criteria: Close reason enum; deterministic PnL rounding rules
records.rule: Close reason enum; deterministic PnL rounding rules
records.scope: Classify trade close and compute canonical PnL

records.pass_criteria: Only enumerated buckets; stable bucket mapping
records.rule: Only enumerated buckets; stable bucket mapping

records.pass_criteria: Frozen-time supported; thresholds validated (no overlaps/gaps)
records.rule: Frozen-time supported; thresholds validated (no overlaps/gaps)

records.pass_criteria: Deterministic fallback hierarchy; matrix version pinned
records.rule: Deterministic fallback hierarchy; matrix version pinned

records.pass_criteria: Hard cap: no reentry beyond R2; no circular chains
records.rule: Hard cap: no reentry beyond R2; no circular chains

records.pass_criteria: Chain depth < configured max; velocity limits; idempotency keys enforced
records.rule: Chain depth < configured max; velocity limits; idempotency keys enforced
records.scope: Loop: reentry intent follows same risk->order->route->transport->execute chain

records.pass_criteria: Deterministic thresholds; stable report format
records.rule: Deterministic thresholds; stable report format
